channel.title: Bigtable on MCP Toolbox for Databases
channel.description: Recent content in Bigtable on MCP Toolbox for Databases

item.title: bigtable-sql
item.description: About A bigtable-sql tool executes a pre-defined SQL statement against a Bigtable instance. It’s compatible with any of the following sources: bigtable GoogleSQL Bigtable supports SQL queries. The integration with Toolbox supports googlesql dialect, the specified SQL statement is executed as a data manipulation language (DML) statements, and specified parameters will inserted according to their name: e.g. @name. Note Bigtable’s GoogleSQL support for DML statements might be limited to certain query types.
